headline: 28 contracts catalogued across Ethereum and Arbitrum; 7 governance/admin and 21 protocol contracts (V2 and Boros).

findings.text: Ethereum: V2 governance multisig (3-of-5), V2 devMultisig (2-of-5), V2 proxyAdmin, Router V3 (Diamond with 6 facets), MarketFactoryV3, Treasury, vePendle, YieldContractFactory, GaugeController catalogued via defipunkd surfacers. Arbitrum: Boros accessController and adminModule surfaced.

Deployed contracts doc referenced at docs.pendle.finance/pendle-v2/Developers/Deployments; deployment files stored in GitHub as /deployments/{chainId}-core.json per chain (1-core.json for Ethereum, 42161-core.json for Arbitrum, etc.).

Audit links provided in protocol context reference github.com/pendle-finance/pendle-core-v2-public/tree/main/audits. V2 contracts audited by 6 auditors per README. Raw audit file access blocked; directory structure confirmed via search.

GitHub repo: pendle-finance/pendle-core-v2-public confirmed. Deployment artifact files exist at expected paths (/deployments/{chainId}-core.json) but raw GitHub file access blocked; JSON structure visible via web search snippets.

Protocol.chains lists 11 chains (Ethereum, Plasma, Arbitrum, Sonic, Hyperliquid L1, Binance, Base, Mantle, Avalanche, Optimism, Berachain). D1-D4 executed for Ethereum and Arbitrum only; remaining 9 chains require further enumeration.

MarketFactoryV3 (0x1A6fCc85557BC4fB7B534ed835a03EF056552D52) is a factory contract; no enumeration method invoked (D6 cap: 50 markets). Router V3 (0x00000000005BBB0EF59571E58418F9a4357b68A0) is a diamond proxy with 6 facets enumerated via facets() view.
Role taxonomy: governance (3-of-5 multisig), devMultisig (2-of-5), proxy_admin, router (diamond), factory, treasury, oracle (gauge controller), vePendle (voting escrow token).

All addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to defipunkd surfacer URLs; additional addresses discovered from MarketFactoryV3 read (treasury, vePendle, gauge controller, yield factory) and Router V3 facets.

rationale.verdict: Discovery submission cataloguing 28 addresses across Ethereum and Arbitrum with full sourcing from block-explorer surfacers and deployed contract documentation. Eight chains remain unexamined (Plasma, Sonic, Hyperliquid L1, Binance, Base, Mantle, Avalanche, Optimism, Berachain), limiting scope. Audit details not retrieved due to GitHub access restrictions. Grade unknown per discovery slice rules.

evidence.shows: V2 governance multisig (3-of-5) with owners: 0x231FC5b, 0x7BD456, 0x9Ce6De, 0x38ab4A, 0xF51736. Proxy admin relationship confirmed.
V2 devMultisig (2-of-5) with owners: 0x806c8c2D, 0xE397e61, 0xF51736, 0xe81B325, 0x231FC5b. Owner of governance multisig per V2 governance context.
ProxyAdmin contract with owner() = 0x8119EC16F0573B7dAc7C0CB94EB504FB32456ee1 (V2 governance multisig).
PendleRouterV3 Diamond proxy with 6 facets: 0x00000000 (self), 0x7f51b16, 0xFf2097, 0x851fA6, 0x32aC6aB, 0x8086174. DiamondCut event emitted for upgrades.
MarketFactoryV3: owner=0x8119EC16 (governance), treasury=0x8270400d, vePendle=0x4f30A9D4, yieldContractFactory=0xdF360101, gaugeController=0x47D74516.
Boros accessController on Arbitrum; no verified ABI found but address catalogued and live.
Boros adminModule (UUPSProxy pattern) on Arbitrum; proxy with admin slot, implements AdminChanged and Upgraded events.
Landing page confirms two main product lines: Boros (margin trading on yields) and Pendle V2 (spot yield trading). References V2 Docs and Boros Docs.
Deployed contracts documentation page; references /deployments/{chainId}-core.json files in repository for each chain.
V2 core contracts repo; Pendle V2 audited by 6 auditors. Audit reports in audits folder. Deployment files pattern: /deployments/{chainId}-core.json.

unknowns: D3: Audit PDF content not fetched (GitHub raw file access blocked). Audit scope and dates unknown.
D4: Deployment artifact JSON content not fetched (GitHub raw file access blocked). Full contract lists per chain incomplete.
D5: Zero addresses surfaced for Plasma (chainId pending), Sonic, Hyperliquid L1, Binance, Base, Mantle, Avalanche, Optimism, Berachain. Further enumeration required.
D6: MarketFactoryV3 factory enumeration capped at 50; no market children enumerated.
D7: Boros contracts on Arbitrum (0x2080808080, 0x353C6Ba) have unknown actor_class (no multisig/timelock signatures visible).

protocol_metadata.about: Pendle is a decentralized yield tokenization and trading protocol. It splits yield-bearing assets into Yield Tokens (YT) representing future yield and Principal Tokens (PT) representing the underlying principal, enabling users to trade, hedge, and leverage yield. The protocol includes Pendle V2 for spot yield trading and Boros for leveraged yield trading with margin.
